'''Clomv''' was a [[Jeodu]] member of [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]], a [[Bodyguard/Legends|personal guard]] for [[Dequc]] as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Mara Jade 6" />
